title: craniolaria annua
intro: Craniolaria annua, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family native to China. The medicinal properties of Craniolaria annua lie in its roots, which are rich in ferulic acid, vitamin E, and other antioxidants, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote menstrual regularity, reduce menstrual cramps and bloating, and support overall women's health. Craniolaria annua is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
